files.reason: shared app-server client facade and typed request helpers ported to TypeScript
websocket-backed remote app-server client ported to TypeScript
transport-level outgoing message types ported to TypeScript
JSON-RPC transport parsing and serialization ported to TypeScript
Thread subscription and connection state manager ported to TypeScript
App-server transport facade points at app-server-transport mirror
Codex Apps connector auth failure parsing, auth elicitation planning, completed-result shaping, and elicitation messages are ported.
Codex Apps catalog cache and connector normalization are ported; filesystem cache storage is adapted behind a package storage interface.

Live MCP manager aggregation, startup snapshot behavior, raw tool routing, resource delegation, transport-origin helpers, and startup error display are ported; native server startup is provided through platform RmcpClientLike adapters.
Elicitation request tracking, policy rejection, auto-deny, empty-form auto-accept, reviewer short-circuiting, event emission, and response resolution are ported.
Crate-level TypeScript exports mirror the ported codex-mcp modules.
OAuth support detection, auth status calculation, scope resolution precedence, and retry-without-scopes checks are ported; discovery uses Web fetch as a platform adaptation.
MCP tool name constants and Responses tool-name sanitization helpers are ported.

ManagedClient, AsyncManagedClient, startup snapshots, tool listing, Codex Apps cache use, plugin provenance annotation, and basic client delegation are ported; native process/HTTP construction is a platform adapter.
MCP tool filtering, file-parameter schema masking, qualification, collision handling, and callable-name length guards are ported.
